PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Benjamin Nam in Propria Persona.

Mr. Nam stated that his Friend who is a Lawyer is helping him, that he is using the Nolo Press book and that he has spoken with a Probate Attorney. Mr. Nam also stated that this is a simple estate, that there is one bank account, that he needs letters and that there is no will. The Court expressed concern stating that there are issues with the petition, that the probate process gets harder and spoke of the several steps (marshal assets, inventory and appraisal, appearances, checking tentative rulings, addressing Examiner's notes, etc.) that are required. The Court also informed Mr. Nam that he is not allowed to distribution anything to himself or the other Beneficiary until there is an order from the Court and urged Mr. Nam to hire a Probate Attorney to assist him with the process. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for September 1, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for December 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
